title: Conversor de Moedas
rateNote: As taxas de câmbio são atualizadas a cada hora. Apenas como referência.

seoDescription: Convert between world currencies using real-time exchange rates. Select from USD, EUR, JPY, GBP, KRW, and many more currencies. This free currency converter helps with international travel, online shopping, and business transactions.
